name: Autumn Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, cook and stir the ground beef until brown.
2. Drain the fat off. Cook and stir the onions with the meat until the onions are tender (about 5 minutes).
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients, except for the tomatoes; heat to boiling.
4. Reduce heat and cover; simmer for 20 minutes.
5. Add the tomatoes; cover and simmer for an additional 10 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
6. Makes 6 servings.
One can (28 ounces) of canned tomatoes (with liquid) can be substituted for the fresh tomatoes. Reduce water to 3 cups. Stir in the tomatoes with the remaining ingredients; heat to boiling. Reduce heat and cover; simmer for 20 minutes. The canned tomatoes break apart and give a rosy color.
